hooks.command: printf '%s' "$TOOL_INPUT" | grep -qE 'git\s+(commit|merge|cherry-pick|rebase)' && [ -f .understand-anything/config.json ] && grep -q '"autoUpdate".*true' .understand-anything/config.json && [ -f .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json ] && echo "[understand-anything] advisory: commit detected with auto-update enabled. Run a dry-run review with ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/auto-update-prompt.md and request approval before writing graph updates." || true

[ -f .understand-anything/config.json ] && grep -q '"autoUpdate".*true' .understand-anything/config.json && [ -f .understand-anything/meta.json ] && [ -f .understand-anything/knowledge-graph.json ] && [ "$(node -p "JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('.understand-anything/meta.json','utf8')).gitCommitHash")" != "$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null)" ] && echo "[understand-anything] advisory: knowledge graph appears stale. Use ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/hooks/auto-update-prompt.md for a dry-run review and request approval before writing graph updates." || true
